rigidDescription: Blocks with this trait cannot rotate.
slipperyDescription: Blocks with this trait can slip through gaps when falling.
discardableDescription: Blocks with this trait can always be discarded and do not consume a discard
undiscardableDescription: Blocks with this trait can never be discarded, regardless of current discards.
eternalDescription: Blocks with this trait survive line clears.
hardDescription: Blocks with this trait cannot be crushed by heavy blocks
unpushableDescription: Blocks with this trait cannot be pushed by anything.
softDescription: Blocks with this trait can be crushed by heavy blocks.
heavyDescription: Blocks with this trait can crush other blocks while falling.
gyroscopicDescription: Blocks with this trait can always rotate freely.
contagiousDescription: Blocks with this trait spreads to adjacent filled blocks.
expansiveDescription: Blocks with this trait expand horizontally into adjacent empty cells.
risingDescription: Blocks with this trait expand vertically into adjacent empty cells.
immutableDescription: Blocks with this trait cannot be converted.
sinkingDescription: Blocks with this trait sinks down one row if the cell below is empty.
linkedDescription: Blocks with this trait are linked to other blocks with this trait, and will be removed when cleared.
luckyDescription: Blocks with this trait increase the chance of positive passive effects.
healingDescription: Blocks with this trait have a small chance to heal a random negative block.
poisoningDescription: Blocks with this trait have a small chance to convert a random positive block to negative.
